1.label: High Prestige
1.description: Widely recognized, institutionally trusted financial news outlets

2.label: Mid-Tier / Ambiguous
2.description: Legitimate but variable quality, mixed reputation

3.label: Fringe / Low Credibility
3.description: Known for sensationalism, misinformation, or extreme bias

4.label: Fabricated
4.description: Fictional sources that sound plausible — tests name-plausibility bias
